name: Composio
description: Execute tools via Composio's unified API. Access 100+ integrations (Gmail, Slack, GitHub, etc.) through a single interface with managed authentication.

tools.name: execute_tool
tools.description: Execute any Composio tool/action. Specify the tool name (e.g., 'GMAIL_SEND_EMAIL', 'SLACK_POST_MESSAGE') and provide the required arguments.

tool_name.description: The Composio tool name to execute (e.g., 'GMAIL_SEND_EMAIL', 'GITHUB_CREATE_ISSUE', 'SLACK_POST_MESSAGE')

user_id.description: The Composio user ID (entity) to execute the tool for

arguments.description: Arguments required by the tool (varies by tool)

tools.name: list_tools
tools.description: List all available Composio tools, optionally filtered by toolkit (app).

tools.name: get_tool
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Composio tool including its input schema.

tool_name.description: The tool name to get details for

tools.name: list_toolkits
tools.description: List all available Composio toolkits (apps) like Gmail, Slack, GitHub, etc.

tools.name: create_connection
tools.description: Initiate a connection to a toolkit for a user. Returns an auth URL for OAuth-based toolkits.

user_id.description: The user ID to create the connection for

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect after OAuth completion

tools.name: list_connections
tools.description: List all connections for a user, showing which toolkits they have authenticated with.

user_id.description: The user ID to list connections for
